# Gcore Account settings

User profile and 2FA, account registration and KYC, billing cycles, payments, expenses, VAT, trial conditions, user roles and IAM, permanent API tokens, Gcore MCP Server installation and integration with Claude Code, Cursor IDE, and MCP Inspector, service notifications, support response times, status page subscriptions.

- [Account settings](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings.md)

## My profile
- [My profile settings](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/my-profile/overview.md): Configure username, email, language, two-factor authentication, password, and view login history in My profile settings for individual user accounts.
- [Set up two-factor authentication](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/my-profile/two-factor-authentication.md): Enable two-factor authentication in Gcore Customer Portal using authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy) and QR code scanning.
- [Change or reset a password](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/my-profile/change-password.md): Update account password in Gcore Customer Portal Profile settings or reset forgotten password via email verification link.
- [What to do if you do not receive the reset email?](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/my-profile/password-reset-email.md): Check spam folder for "Password Recovery" email from support@gcore.com; retry password reset at auth.gcore.com/login/forgot-password if email not received wi...

## Account
- [Account settings](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/account/overview.md): Configure account identification, billing address, tax location, currency, and initiate KYC verification to switch from individual to company account status.
- [Create an account for an individual or legal entity](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/account/create-account.md): Register individual or legal entity accounts via Google, GitHub, or email; confirm registration and access Gcore Customer Portal dashboard.
- [Create an additional account and switch between accounts](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/account/additional-accounts.md): Create and switch between multiple accounts from a single login using the profile menu's Switch account and Create a new account options.
- [Disable or resume services](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/account/services.md): Disable, resume, or activate Gcore services via Customer Portal Services page with status tracking and suspension timelines.
- [Account deletion](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/account/account-deletion.md): Request permanent account deletion via Settings > Account > General information; suspended accounts with outstanding debt cannot be deleted until payment is ...

## Billing
- [Billing overview](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/billing/overview.md): Track consumption-based billing cycles, threshold comparisons, and Cloud Pay-As-You-Go tariff charges collected monthly with 5-minute intervals.
- [Expenses](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/billing/expenses.md): View consumed Gcore product costs by service, feature, usage, and pricing rule status (commitment/overcommitment) with tax and discount breakdowns.
- [Payments and payment methods](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/billing/payments.md): View payment history, transaction statuses (Paid, Unpaid, Pending, Refunded, Cancelled), and manage payment methods (credit card, debit card, PayPal, Google ...
- [Bonuses and discounts](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/billing/bonuses-and-discounts.md): View bonus credits and active discounts in the Billing section; track bonus transactions, expiration dates, and discount percentages by service and feature.
- [Trial conditions](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/billing/trial-conditions.md): Activate free trial periods for CDN, Video Streaming, Web Application Security, and Managed DNS Pro with specified duration and usage limits via Gcore Custom...
- [VAT rates in different countries for an individual and legal entity](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/billing/vat-rates.md): Reference VAT rates by country and user type (individual or organization), with conditional rates for EU organizations based on VAT number provision.
- [TAX location](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/billing/tax-location.md): Configure tax location in billing profile to determine applicable tax rates and VAT charges based on country regulations and payment method information.
- [Data deletion](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/billing/data-deletion.md): Delete suspended services and associated customer data after product-specific retention periods ranging from immediate deletion to 90 days for CDN, DNS, Vide...
- [payment-verification](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/billing/payment-verification.md)

## Users
- [About users](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/users/about-users.md): Define user roles (Administrator, Engineer, Purge and Prefetch) and permissions for CDN, Video Streaming, and account management in Gcore Customer Portal.
- [Invite, edit, and delete a user](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/users/manage-users.md): Invite users to Gcore Customer Portal with configurable roles for CDN, IAM, Edge Cloud, and other services; send invitations via email to registered or new u...
- [Create, use, or delete a permanent API token](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/api-tokens.md): Create, configure, and manage permanent API tokens with role-based access control, expiration settings, and APIKey authorization headers for automated CDN op...
- [Manage service notifications and promotional emails](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/notifications.md): Configure product notifications, technical alerts, and promotional emails per user or account-wide in Gcore Customer Portal Profile settings; set CDN and Obj...
- [How quickly our support team will respond to you](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/how-quickly-our-support-team-will-respond-to-you.md): Support response times depend on billing plan (free/medium/PRO+), request priority (P1–P4), and support team workload; set priority in Help Center for CDN, V...
- [Be aware of the service status, scheduled and emergency maintenance](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/be-aware-of-the-service-status-scheduled-and-emergency-maintenance.md): Subscribe to Gcore Status Page via email, Slack, or webhook to receive notifications about service outages, scheduled maintenance, and incident updates.
- [Roadmap: Provide feedback, suggest new features, follow development](https://gcore.com/docs/account-settings/roadmap-provide-feedback-suggest-new-features-follow-development.md): Submit feature requests and track development status across CDN, Managed DNS, Edge Cloud, Video Streaming, and Web Application Security products on Gcore Roa...
